title: Sudden dyspnea in a 34-year-old female
presentation: A 34-year-old female, 6 weeks post-partum, presents with sudden onset shortness of breath and right-sided pleuritic chest pain starting 2 hours ago. She has been mostly sedentary since delivery. Vitals: BP 118/76, HR 112, RR 24, SpO2 93% on room air, Temp 37.4C. Exam: mild right calf swelling and tenderness, lungs clear.

gold_standard_workup.key_decision_point: Post-partum state + tachycardia + hypoxia + calf swelling = high pretest probability for PE, start anticoagulation
